subcodes.title: Words spoken at Pleiades Sylvan Bower, Alhammeh near Tiberias, 1914-05-10
subcodes.first_line: God hath made all the phenomena for the sake of man and created man for Himself. We consider that the sun is shining, the clouds are pouring down rain
subcodes.subjects: @purpose; goal of creation, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @human reality created in the image of God, @man is the sum; pinnacle; fruit of creation
